Title: The first poem In the book
I bet you want me to write fiction
There are no asylums for the real crazy women
Don't you hate when people ask stupid questions
This is not a poem about revolution
How can you fuck without kissing?
The Words Don't Fit In My Mouth
My caged bird don't sing and every black bird ain't a piece of fried chicken
Yellow people are brown on the tips
Five-percent of Maine,,, or, Don't mess with motha nature
Keisha & other girls who dream with their eyes open
For Donald Goines to the third power
Who will be the last poet?
Read this if it applies to you
Is it revolutionary for a woman to cook her man dinner?
